notes: Upgradable vault (admin-governed `upgrade(new_wasm_hash)`; storage preserved). Deployed + verified live: consent write/read smoke test AND a live on-chain upgrade tx both succeeded. Per-currency tokens + Blend pools (set_token/set_pool_allowed/set_configured_pool) are wired at origin U20 with real USDC/EURC SACs + Blend testnet pools. Upgrade should move behind a timelock/multisig before mainnet (deferred). Testnet resets ~quarterly — redeploy via scripts/deploy.ts.

upgrades.note: STE-31 (earn-history U2): adds the read-only NAV views `share_price(currency)` and `value_of(user,currency)`. Same contract id, storage preserved. Verified live post-upgrade: all three buckets price at 1000000000 (SHARE_PRICE_SCALE, the empty-bucket base) and `value_of` reads 0. Yield never accrues on-chain yet — `total_assets` moves only on deposit/withdraw — so `share_price` stays at the base scale until mark-to-market NAV ships.
